const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3001/api';class ApiService{constructor(){this.baseURL=API_BASE_URL;}async request(endpoint){let options=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const url=`${this.baseURL}${endpoint}`;const config={headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',...options.headers},...options};try{const response=await fetch(url,config);const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){var _data$error;throw new Error(((_data$error=data.error)===null||_data$error===void 0?void 0:_data$error.message)||`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);}return data;}catch(error){if(error.name==='TypeError'&&error.message.includes('fetch')){throw new Error('Network error. Please check your connection.');}throw error;}}// Notes API methods
async getNotes(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;let limit=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:20;return this.request(`/notes?page=${page}&limit=${limit}`);}async getNote(id){return this.request(`/notes/${id}`);}async createNote(noteData){return this.request('/notes',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(noteData)});}async updateNote(id,noteData){return this.request(`/notes/${id}`,{method:'PUT',body:JSON.stringify(noteData)});}async deleteNote(id){return this.request(`/notes/${id}`,{method:'DELETE'});}async searchNotes(searchTerm){let page=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:1;let limit=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:20;return this.request(`/notes/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(searchTerm)}&page=${page}&limit=${limit}`);}}export default new ApiService();
